assertions.evidence: src/i18n/routing.ts uses 'import { defineRouting } from "next-intl/routing"' and exports the routing object. Documented as 'la fuente de verdad de toda la configuración'.
middleware.ts uses 'import createMiddleware from "next-intl/middleware"' and 'export default createMiddleware(routing)'.

src/i18n/navigation.ts uses createNavigation(routing). Explicit table showing 'import { Link } from "@/i18n/navigation"' vs NOT using 'next/link'. Warning: 'si usas el de Next.js, los enlaces no tendrán locale'.
app/[locale]/layout.tsx has NextIntlClientProvider wrapping children with messages from getMessages(). Explains why getMessages() instead of direct JSON load.

Full comparison table: getTranslations() (Server Component, async, from 'next-intl/server') vs useTranslations() (Client Component, sync, from 'next-intl'). Rule: 'por defecto, usa getTranslations() en Server Components'.
